voice_observations.caption_text:
We’ve got the key to a perfect week right here 💚 Feb 17–22 👇

🟰 WAFER FT. KIT KAT® (NEW)
A classic cookie filled with crunchy KIT KAT® pieces, topped with a pool of milk chocolate and more deliciously crushed KIT KAT® pieces.

💚 KEY LIME PIE COOKIE
A refreshing, zesty lime filling in a buttery graham pie cookie, topped with whipped cream, graham cracker crumbs, and a fresh lime wedge to squeeze on top.

🥛 TRES LECHES CAKE
A light, fluffy vanilla cake soaked in a classic tres leches sauce, topped with whipped cream, and sprinkled with a layer of cinnamon.

❄️ ICED OATMEAL
A cinnamon oatmeal cookie smothered with a delicious vanilla cream cheese glaze.

🥜 CHOCOLATE PEANUT BUTTER PIE (NEW)
A cookies & cream pie crust layered with creamy peanut butter filling, topped with swirls of whipped cream, and sprinkled with peanut butter cups and cookies & cream crumbs.

🍫 CHOCOLATE CAKE BATTER
A rich chocolate cake batter cookie swirled with fudge frosting and topped with chocolate cake batter cake balls and vibrant sprinkles.

🍪 SEMI-SWEET CHOCOLATE CHUNK
Chocolate chip, but make it chunky—a delicious cookie filled with irresistible semi-sweet chocolate chunks and a sprinkle of flaky sea salt.

Don’t forget, Minis are now available all week long! 🍪 Available only in select products while supplies last. ✨
voice_observations.hook_text: We’ve got the key to a perfect week right here 💚
voice_observations.voiceover_text: I want you back I want you back I want you back I want you back I want you back I want you back I want you back
